source_pr.title: expression: refine builtin-func RAND (fix issue3211)
source_pr.body:
This commit fixes #3211 through recording the state of RAND built-in function.

``` sql
create table t (a int);
insert into t values(1),(2),(3),(4);
select rand(20160101) from t;
```

Before this commit, the query above gets 4 same results,
because rand(20160101) executes 
``` go
rand.Seed(seed)
rand.Float64() 
```
repeatedly.

@shenli @coocood PTAL

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
